title: osmanthus eucleoides
intro: Osmanthus eucleoides, also known as Chrysanthemum indicum var. eucleoides, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Osmanthus eucleoides include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In traditional medicine, Osmanthus eucleoides is prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
